text_excerpt: News | Helen Whately MP Skip to main content Main navigation Home News About Helen Newsletter My Articles Listening to You News Do you want a politician managing your pension? I don't. Wednesday, 29 April, 2026 Rachel Reeves wanted control over more than £400bn of your private pension savings. Labour suggested they’d invest it in net zero and Reform have proposed using pensions to nationalise steel and water. The problem is, it’s not their money. Pensions are people’s hard-earned and hard-saved money, not piggy banks for governments to raid when they are short of cash. For months I have been standing up...
